hero.verse: "I am the gate; whoever enters through me will be saved."
hero.subtitle: A community rooted in the Gospel, reaching Namur and beyond.

about.headline: Welcome to GRC
about.p1: Gate of Redemption Church is a young, Spirit-filled church of about 40 members in Namur, Montréal. We are passionate about the Great Commission — making disciples, sharing the Gospel, and serving our community.
about.p2: We're new here, but our mission isn't. Everyone is welcome.
about.cta: New Here? We'd love to meet you →

services.headline: Join Us

sunday.title: Sunday Worship Service
sunday.desc: Experience uplifting worship, powerful preaching, and genuine fellowship.

bibleStudy.title: Weekly Bible Study
bibleStudy.desc: Dive deeper into God's Word in an intimate, discussion-driven setting.

evangelism.title: Evangelism Outreach
evangelism.desc: Join us as we share the love of Christ in our neighbourhood.

services.note: All services held in both English and French.

card1.title: The Great Commission
card1.desc: "Go and make disciples of all nations." We exist to share the Gospel with everyone God places in our path.

card2.title: Community Outreach
card2.desc: Loving our neighbourhood through service, presence, and compassion.

card3.title: Discipleship
card3.desc: Growing together through the Word, prayer, and authentic community.

outreach.headline: Ministries
outreach.subtitle: Serving Namur and beyond with the love of Christ.

items.title: Neighbourhood Food Drive
items.desc: Providing meals and essentials to families in need.

items.title: Small Groups
items.desc: Smaller gatherings for concentrated worship and Bible study.

items.title: Street Evangelism
items.desc: Sharing the Gospel on the streets of our community.

items.title: Discipleship Mentorship
items.desc: Raising and training disciples to walk boldly in their faith.

items.title: Youth Mentorship
items.desc: Investing in the next generation through mentoring.

items.title: Sunday Worship Service
items.desc: Join us for a powerful time of worship and the Word.

items.title: Wednesday Bible Study
items.desc: Grow in faith through in-depth study of Scripture.

items.title: Evangelism Saturday
items.desc: Go out and share the Gospel in our community.

items.title: Community Outreach Day
items.desc: A day dedicated to serving our neighbours with love.

items.title: Youth Night
items.desc: An evening of worship, games, and fellowship for youth.

items.title: Prayer & Fasting
items.desc: Seek the Lord together through corporate prayer and fasting.

connect.headline: Ready to take your next step?
connect.subtitle: Whether you're exploring faith or looking for a church family — there's a place for you at GRC.
